channel.title: Operational Procedures on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Operational Procedures on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operational Procedures
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operational Procedures" , "Documentation" , "Change Management" , "Backups" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Professionalism" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operational procedures for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn documentation, change management, backups, safety, environmental controls, communication, scripting, and AI basics.

item.title: CompTIA A+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the 220-1201 and 220-1202 Exams
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "IT Certification" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "Operating Systems" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "IT Support" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Windows Administration"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA A+ study course covering all exam objectives for the 220-1201 Core 1 and 220-1202 Core 2 exams. Learn hardware, networking, operating systems, security, and troubleshooting.
